<var>
$DPS$ = ((Damage * 2) + Critical Damage) / 3 / Warden Stats.Swingrate
$CDMG$ = {{#expr:Damage * Critical Hit Multiplier round 0}}
$PDMG$ = {{#expr:floor(Warden Stats.Damage * 2)}}
$PCDMG$ = {{#expr:floor(Warden Stats.Damage * (2 - 1) + Warden Stats.Critical Damage)}}
$CE$ = $TP$ / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 1850; 975; 1987; 5750; 16500
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 1000; 350; 1250; 4500; 17500
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; 3;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Night Shift; Heavier Stick; Stunning Blows; Class Foxtrot Defense Level
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 11415010529; 11415012702; 11415014676; 11415015418
$CREF$ = <ref name=crit>Every third hit is a critical hit. Critical hits increase damage by 50%. If the damage is a decimal, the damage is rounded up.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>Calculated as ((Damage × 2) + Critical Damage) ÷ 3 ÷ Swingrate.</ref>
$TREF$ = <ref name=thirdhit>Only happens every third hit.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="10" | Warden Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Critical Hit Multiplier !! Critical Damage$CREF$ !! Swingrate !! Range !! Stun Time !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 1.5 || $CDMG$ || 0.6 || 6.5 || 0.5$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 17 || 1.75 || $CDMG$ || 0.6 || 7 || 0.5$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 28 || 1.75 || $CDMG$ || 0.55 || 7 || 0.75$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 48 || 2 || $CDMG$ || 0.45 || 7.5 || 0.75 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 80 || 3 || $CDMG$ || 0.45 || 8.5 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="6" | Parry Stats
|-
! Level !! Damage !! Critical Damage !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 4 || $PDMG$ || $PCDMG$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Critical Hit Multiplier !! Critical Damage$CREF$ !! Swingrate !! Range !! Stun Time !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 1.5 || $CDMG$ || 0.65 || 6 || 0.65$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 1.5 || $CDMG$ || 0.65 || 6 || 0.65$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 1.5 || $CDMG$ || 0.6 || 7 || 1.25$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 34 || 1.5 || $CDMG$ || 0.6 || 7 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 80 || 1.5 || $CDMG$ || 0.5 || 7.5 || 1.75 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
